fields.label: Run ID
fields.description: Server-minted idempotency key for this send; immutable; the doctype name.

fields.label: Conversation
fields.description: Owning conversation; per-conversation single-flight scopes on it.

fields.label: Relay Target ID
fields.description: Container/gateway shard; admission credits + lease + epoch key on it. Phase 0 uses one site-wide shard.

fields.label: Turn Class
fields.description: Fairness class: interactive (typed/retry/continuation) vs background (File Box / app-learning).

fields.label: State
fields.options:
queued
preparing
ready
dispatching
streaming
terminal_observed
finalizing
done
errored
cancelled
recovering
fields.description: Full D2 state machine: queued -> preparing -> ready -> dispatching -> streaming -> terminal_observed -> finalizing -> done|errored, + cancelled (from every cancellable state) and recovering (explicit re-entry route).

fields.label: Version
fields.description: Optimistic-concurrency token; bumped on EVERY transition; the actor-fence half of every CAS.

fields.label: Pump Epoch
fields.description: Generation of the pump that owns this turn's streaming lifecycle; stamped at ready->dispatching, re-stamped by takeover reconciliation; the epoch-fence half of every pump-owned CAS. MariaDB, not Redis, is the fence (D2 #5).

fields.label: Gateway Run ID
fields.description: The runId openclaw returns at the agent ack; broadcast frames are matched on it. Set at dispatching->streaming; null until ack (D2 #2).

fields.label: Seed Message
fields.description: The user message row that seeded this turn; its seq was allocated under the conversation lock (D3 Race 1).

fields.label: Assistant Message
fields.description: The assistant row deltas stream into; created by prepare; null until preparing (D2 #9).

fields.label: Last Event Seq
fields.description: High-water mark of applied broadcast event_seq (watermark); delta apply guards event_seq > last_event_seq so re-attach + duplicate frames are idempotent (D2 #10, Amendment B).

fields.label: Reserved
fields.description: Holds one admission credit. Reserved under the Jarvis Relay Pump shard lock (OAR-1) at the queued->preparing grant; cleared at settlement (D2 #11).

fields.label: Reservation Expires At
fields.description: Set when a credit is reserved at send-acceptance but not yet CLAIMED; NULLed at the queued->preparing claim (OAR-5) so a slow prepare is never reclaimed (D2 #12).

fields.label: Cancel Requested
fields.description: Web-sender sets it to request cancellation of an in-flight turn; the pump observes it, drives the out-of-band chat.abort, and settles to cancelled (D2 #17).

fields.label: Cancel Reason
fields.description: Recorded reason when a queued turn is system-cancelled (age-out, SUX-5).

fields.label: Recovering
fields.description: Set together with state='recovering' when the watchdog/pump parks a turn on reconcile-mismatch, deadline, or DB error; mirrors Message.recovering; drives the SUX-1 reconnecting banner. Cleared on the recovering exit (D2 recovering route).

fields.label: Was Recovered
fields.description: Set when a watchdog/recovery re-attached or re-dispatched this turn (or a takeover re-stamped it); feeds the attempt suffix + stale-fence telemetry (D2 #16).

fields.label: Usage Recorded
fields.description: (turn_id) idempotency guard for token-usage accrual (R-4 / §10.7): CAS 0->1 in finalize so a finalize replay can never double-count the soft monthly cap. The naked += is retired; usage is a fenced once-only enrichment effect.

fields.label: Terminal Kind
fields.description: Recorded at streaming->terminal_observed so SETTLEMENT is recoverable from the row alone if the pump dies before settling (D2 #13, R-12).

fields.label: Terminal Payload
fields.description: The terminal frame's projected final text or error (JSON), captured at terminal_observed; the settlement txn reads it to write the final assistant projection (D2 #14).

fields.label: Error
fields.description: User-facing error payload on errored/failed-final. Mirrors Message.error (D2 #15).

fields.label: Dispatch Payload
fields.description: JSON of the extra enqueue kwargs (attachments/context) so a queued turn re-dispatches with them on promotion.

fields.label: Enqueued At
fields.description: Stamped at (none)->queued; queue_wait_ms baseline (D2 #18).

fields.label: Preparing At
fields.description: Stamped at queued->preparing (D2 #19); the PREPARE_DEADLINE_S=300 watchdog baseline.

fields.label: Ready At
fields.description: Stamped at preparing->ready (D2 #20).

fields.label: Dispatching At
fields.description: Stamped at ready->dispatching; admission-credit confirm point; the recovering-exit origin discriminator (NULL => pre-dispatch park, D2 #21) (D2 #21).

fields.label: First Event At
fields.description: Stamped at dispatching->streaming (first broadcast frame / ack); streaming-stall SLO baseline (D2 #22).

fields.label: Terminal Observed At
fields.description: Stamped at streaming->terminal_observed; watchdog uses it to tell 'settlement owed' from a still-streaming turn (D2 #23).

fields.label: Finalizing At
fields.description: Stamped at the settlement txn terminal_observed->finalizing; watchdog uses it to tell 'enrichment owed' from 'settlement owed' (D2 #24).

fields.label: Done At
fields.description: Stamped at finalizing->done|errored|cancelled; terminal timestamp for retention/GC (D2 #25).

fields.label: Recovery Started At
fields.description: When the recovering route was entered; bounds recovery backoff before parking (D2 #26).

fields.label: Deadline At
fields.description: Per-turn soft deadline (dispatch time + TURN_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=600); the stale-scan sweeper marks recovering/errored past it (D2 #27).
